name: experiment-lifecycle
description: Run GPU experiments like a researcher — the full lifecycle in two skills. design-experiment: propose with taste, write a DESIGN.md pre-registration, clear it with the human through verify-claims gates, emit a thin START.md brief + CHECKLIST.md gates, dispatch to a fresh-context executor. run-experiment: the zero-context executor — arm a self-wake, acquire compute (gpu-job), provision + drive + collect + close (RESULTS vs pre-registered rules, cross-family audit, teardown). Instance specifics live in an execution profile; pairs with gpu-job (backend) and verify-claims (gates).
